name: Acom Co., Ltd.
summary: Acom Co., Ltd. engages in the loan and credit card business in Japan and internationally. The company operates through Loan and Credit Card Business, Guarantee Business, Overseas Financial Business, Loan Servicing Business, and Others segments. It provides unsecured and secured loans; housing loans; credit cards; guarantees products; and loan servicing covering purchased receivables. Acom Co., Ltd. also offers installment sales financing; banking; and contact center contracting and temporary personnel services. The company was founded in 1936 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
